title: PDF Viewer floating menu button (dbg109)
description:
Restores the PDF Viewer workspace menu as a floating, draggable ☰ control in the top-right corner. Tap to open a small menu with Close workspace. Replaces the plain ✕ close button from dbg108.

Line size and Opacity float widgets unchanged. Map workspace unchanged.

Who is affected: OVH private server PipeSync Plan View PDF Viewer.
changeLog: Floating draggable ☰ menu widget in PDF Viewer top-right.
Dropdown menu with Close workspace action.
